      "text": "Stahjeeteß ſcho Nafti

"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet juhs ne iſwatzajeet

"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ſazzija Ozijus un tee

keem.
"

    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atgreeſahß tee at-

"

    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta IX. Nodalla.

Wakkarã veeneſts ktua / tad

"

    {
      "n": 2,

      "text": "Ak Kungs ! manna Thewa

"

    {
      "n": 3,

    {
      "n": 4,

      "text": "Un effi winnu Seewas

ma / un wiſſu winnu Laup-

gu Atraitni!
